arts.ttl: Paul Merson and Chris Sutton agree on Liverpool vs Everton Merseyside Derby prediction
arts.sum: Liverpool travel to Goodison Park to face Everton in Saturday's Merseyside derby

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk's reaction to Jordan Pickford trying to say sorry spoke volumes
arts.sum: Jordan Pickford offered an apology to Virgil van Dijk for the challenge that left the Liverpool defender with a serious knee injury back in 2020

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk has already given the game away about Liverpool plan at Everton
arts.sum: In this week's Blood Red column, Paul Gorst looks ahead to the Merseyside derby and what is the final-ever league fixture between Everton and Liverpool at Goodison Park

arts.ttl: 'I'll never forget' - Everton derby memories as Goodison prepares for last dance with Liverpool
arts.athr: liverpool.news@trinitymirror.com (Joe Thomas, Chris Beesley, Ian Croll, Connor O'Neill, Dan Haygarth)
arts.sum: In this Royal Blue special, ECHO staff recount their Goodison Park derby day memories and reflect on what the occasion means to them ahead of what is likely to be the final time Everton host Liverpool at the Grand Old Lady

arts.ttl: Liverpool stars couldn't sleep after Everton took it too far in the Merseyside Derby
arts.sum: Liverpool's 2020 trip to Goodison Park was marred by a horror tackle by Jordan Pickford that left Virgil van Dijk sidelined for almost a year, and it ultimately proved costly for the Reds that season

arts.ttl: 'Everton take it too far - Liverpool stars couldn't sleep after Merseyside Derby incident'
arts.sum: Liverpool travel to Everton for the last Merseyside Derby at Goodison Park, which takes place four years after Virgil van Dijk's dreams of captaining the Netherlands at Euro 2020 were tarnished

arts.ttl: I turned up to Liverpool trial in Everton kit - I upset fans but I had a good reason
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher's Everton background is well-known, and his fervent fandom of the Blues got him in hot water with Liverpool's youth coaches during his playing days

arts.ttl: What TV channel is Everton vs Liverpool on? How to watch Merseyside derby
arts.sum: Everton host Liverpool in what's set to be the last Merseyside Derby at Goodison Park today (December 7) before the Toffees move into their new Everton Stadium next season

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk made his Jordan Pickford feelings clear when keeper 'tried to apologise'
arts.sum: Liverpool's trip to Goodison Park will see Virgil van Dijk once again face Jordan Pickford, who was responsible for putting the Reds skipper out of action for almost a year

arts.ttl: Why Alexis Mac Allister Isn't Playing vs. Everton
arts.sum: Liverpool's Alexis Mac Allister is serving a one-game suspension for yellow card accumulation against Everton.
